key_concepts: A deterministic method for handling infinite or uncontrolled numbers of categories without memorizing all names.
Matches string categories through a hashing function straight into a strict predefined width.
Limits matrix blowout, but risks collisions where two differing categories fold into the same column hash.

definitions.definition: Operasi memetakan deretan ukuran tak terbatas parameter tekstual jatuh pada panjang ukuran nilai memori baku terhingga.

examples: Hashing thousands of unique IP Addresses strictly into an operational limit of just 128 integer columns.
